case_title: ICE MACHINE INC. VS DAM QUANG IND/DBA SILK EMPORUIM

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DAM QUANG IND/DBA SILK EMPORUIM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,171.00 FILED BY ICE MACHINE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DAM QUANG IND/DBA SILK EMPORUIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ICE MACHINE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAM QUANG IND/DBA SILK EMPORUIM $4,171.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,218.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
